info.title: Registry Relay API
info.summary: Read-only data gateway exposing entity records, catalog metadata, and SHACL/DCAT-AP shapes for governed datasets.
info.description: Abstract HTTP contract for Registry Relay v0.1. Paths use placeholders ({dataset_id}, {entity}, {id}, ...) because dataset and entity names are runtime configuration, not part of the contract. For the instance-specific document that lists the concrete datasets and entities exposed by one running gateway, fetch the auth-gated `GET /openapi.json` route on that deployment. Hand-authored from `docs/api.md`; keep both in sync.

servers.description: Replace with the base URL of a deployed Registry Relay instance.

tags.name: Service
tags.description: Liveness, readiness, and the local Scalar API reference shell.

tags.name: Catalog
tags.description: Dataset discovery: catalog listing, dataset summaries, entity JSON Schemas.

tags.name: Records
tags.description: Entity collection, single record, and relationship reads. Field set, allowed filters, and required filters are per-entity configuration.

tags.name: Aggregates
tags.description: Pre-declared aggregate discovery and execution. Disclosure control is per-aggregate configuration. Indicator and dimension discovery routes are dataset-scoped and generated from the aggregate declarations: reused identifiers are merged into single records with `queryable_via` links. CSV output is available via `?f=csv` and carries `X-Registry-Relay-*` and `X-SPDCI-*` disclosure/freshness headers plus a `Link: rel="describedby"` to aggregate metadata. When built with `ogcapi-edr`, configured `admin_area` aggregates are also exposed as OGC EDR `/area` collections.

tags.name: Metadata
tags.description: Standards-facing metadata: catalog JSON, DCAT, BRegDCAT-AP, SHACL, JSON Schema, OGC Records bodies, dataset-scoped metadata. Filtered to the caller's metadata scopes.

tags.name: Evidence offerings
tags.description: Discovery records for Registry Notary. Relay publishes the metadata; claims and evidence are submitted to Registry Notary, not Relay.

tags.name: OpenAPI
tags.description: The auth-gated, metadata-filtered OpenAPI document for the running instance. Use this abstract document for the contract; fetch `/openapi.json` from a running gateway for the instance shape.

tags.name: OGC API Features
tags.description: Read-only GeoJSON Features over entities configured with a `spatial` block. Available only when the gateway is built with the `ogcapi-features` feature.

tags.name: OGC API Records
tags.description: Metadata-only catalog view conforming to OGC API - Records. The initial collection is `datasets`; each item describes a visible `dcat:Dataset`. Available only when built with the `ogcapi-records` feature.

tags.name: OGC API EDR
tags.description: Environmental Data Retrieval views over configured `admin_area` spatial aggregates. Available only when built with the `ogcapi-edr` feature.

tags.name: SP DCI
tags.description: SP DCI sync-search adapter. `sync/search` is generic across configured `standards.spdci.registries` entries; the disability-specific paths require `standards.spdci.disability_registry`. Available only when built with `spdci-api-standards` and the relevant config is set.

tags.name: Provenance
tags.description: Verifier-support routes (DID Web, JSON Schemas, JSON-LD contexts) used when callers opt in to VC-JWT responses with `Accept: application/vc+jwt`. Mounted only when `provenance.enabled: true`.

get.description: Returns `200 OK` when the process is running. Unauthenticated. Use this for container liveness probes.
Returns `200 OK` once startup ingest and metadata compilation have completed. Unauthenticated. Use this for container readiness probes.

200.description: Gateway has finished startup and is ready to serve traffic.

503.description: Gateway is still starting or has not yet completed initial ingest.

get.description: Serves an HTML page that loads the auth-gated `GET /openapi.json` document after the caller pastes a bearer token. The HTML itself is unauthenticated and contains no catalog data.
Static JavaScript bundle that powers the `/docs` Scalar viewer shell. Unauthenticated; contains no catalog data.

Returns an OpenAPI 3.1 document that lists the operations and dataset/entity tags visible to the caller's metadata scopes. The shape depends on the gateway's configuration; this abstract document describes the contract, not any one deployment.

200.description: OpenAPI document for the running instance, filtered to the caller's metadata scopes.

get.description: Returns a JSON landing document with links to every metadata surface and an embedded scoped catalog. Filtered to the caller's metadata scopes.
Returns the JSON catalog filtered to the caller's metadata scopes.
Returns a DCAT (Data Catalog Vocabulary) catalog as JSON-LD. Filtered to the caller's metadata scopes.
Returns the requested DCAT application profile as JSON-LD. Profile examples include `bregdcat-ap` for BRegDCAT-AP.
Lists the DCAT application profiles the gateway can render, filtered to the caller's metadata visibility.
Returns the profile descriptor (identifier, label, conforming standards) for the named profile.
Returns SHACL node shapes in JSON-LD, scoped to visible datasets and entities.
Returns ODRL policy statements as JSON-LD. Filtered to the caller's metadata scopes.
Returns the dataset-scoped metadata for every dataset visible to the caller.
Returns metadata for one dataset.
Returns the ODRL access-policy document for one visible dataset.

get.summary: List entities under a dataset (metadata view)
get.description: Returns the entity descriptors that belong to one dataset, filtered to the caller's metadata visibility.
Returns metadata for one entity (declared fields, allowed filters, required filters, policy links).
Returns the Draft 2020-12 JSON Schema for one entity, scoped to the caller's metadata visibility.
Returns the SHACL node shape that constrains one entity, as JSON-LD.
URL-stable JSON Schema endpoint for one entity, suitable for `$ref` from external SHACL or contract validators that pin schema URLs. Identical content to the entity schema metadata route.

Returns the link-free OGC API - Records bodies for visible datasets. This is the metadata-side projection of the Records adapter and is always available, independent of the `ogcapi-records` runtime feature.

parameters.name: record_id
parameters.description: OGC Records identifier (typically the dataset id).

get.description: Returns the link-free OGC API - Records body for one record.
Returns the discovery records for evidence offerings owned by datasets visible to the caller.
Returns one evidence-offering discovery record. Submitting claims and evidence is handled by Registry Notary, not by Relay.
Returns every dataset visible to the caller's metadata scopes.

Returns the dataset summary: entities, publishers, sensitivity, update frequency, and links to JSON, JSON-LD, and SHACL artifacts. Acts as Relay-native discovery for the standards adapters mounted under `/ogc/v1/*` and `/dci/*`.
Returns the Draft 2020-12 JSON Schema for one entity, scoped to the caller's metadata visibility.

Returns paginated entity records. Supports projection via `fields`, relationship expansion via `expand`, configured filters via `<field>[.<op>]` query parameters, opaque cursor pagination, and `If-None-Match` conditional requests. Entities with `require_purpose_header: true` require the `Data-Purpose` header. Entities with `required_filters` reject unfiltered enumeration.

304.description: Not modified; the validator in `If-None-Match` matches the current page.

get.description: Returns one entity record by primary key. `fields` projection, `expand` expansion, and the `Data-Purpose` header behave the same as on the collection route.

get.summary: Get records related to one entity
get.description: Returns records reachable from one entity record via a declared relationship. Pagination, projection, filtering, and the `Data-Purpose` header behave the same as on the collection route.
Returns every aggregate declared for the dataset, with their declared group-by columns, measures, and disclosure-control policy.
Executes a declared aggregate with no body. Use the `POST .../query` variant when you need to pass dimension filters or temporal bounds.

200.description: Aggregate result with disclosure-control applied to groups.

post.description: Executes a declared aggregate with dimension filters and optional temporal bounds. Temporal bounds are accepted only for aggregates that declare a `temporal_field`. CSV output is available with `?f=csv` or request body `"format": "csv"`; the response then carries `X-Registry-Relay-*` and `X-SPDCI-*` disclosure/freshness headers and a `Link: rel="describedby"` to the aggregate metadata.

200.description: Aggregate result with disclosure-control applied to groups. JSON by default; CSV when requested.

get.description: Returns descriptive metadata for one aggregate (group-by columns, measures, disclosure-control policy, optional temporal field, linked indicators and dimensions).

Returns the indicators discovered from aggregate declarations. Reused indicator identifiers are merged into one record, with `queryable_via`, `valid_dimensions`, and links back to the aggregate routes that can compute them.
Returns the merged discovery record for one indicator, including the aggregates that can compute it and the dimensions it accepts.
Returns the dimensions discovered from aggregate declarations. Reused dimension identifiers are merged into one record with `queryable_via` links back to the aggregate routes.
Returns the merged discovery record for one dimension, including the aggregates that expose it.
OGC API - Features landing page with links to `conformance`, `collections`, and `openapi`. Available only when the gateway is built with `ogcapi-features`.
Conformance classes implemented by this gateway.
Returns every spatial collection visible to the caller across every dataset. Equivalent to the union of `/ogc/v1/datasets/{dataset_id}/collections`.

get.summary: List spatial collections for a dataset
get.description: Returns every spatial collection declared on entities in this dataset.
Returns the collection metadata for one spatial entity.

Returns GeoJSON Features for one spatial entity. Item routes require the entity's row-read scope and preserve required filters, purpose headers, projection, audit, and opaque cursor pagination. `bbox-crs` accepts CRS84 only; `datetime` requires `spatial.datetime_field` on the entity.

parameters.name: bbox
parameters.description: WGS84 bounding box `minLon,minLat,maxLon,maxLat`. Accepted for point geometry and for entities with precomputed bbox fields.

parameters.name: bbox-crs
parameters.description: CRS for `bbox`. Only CRS84 is supported.

parameters.name: datetime
parameters.description: RFC 3339 instant or interval. Requires `spatial.datetime_field` on the entity.

parameters.name: feature_id
parameters.description: Feature identifier (matches the entity's primary key).

get.description: Returns a single GeoJSON Feature by primary key.
OGC API - Records landing page. Mounted only when built with `ogcapi-records`.
Conformance classes implemented by the records adapter.
Returns the available record collections. The initial Records surface has one collection, `datasets`.
Returns the collection metadata for one record collection.

Returns records in one collection. The `datasets` collection supports `q` (case-insensitive text search across visible dataset and entity metadata), `limit` (1..1000), and `after` (opaque signed pagination cursor from a `rel=next` link). Unsupported spatial or search parameters return `400`.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive text search across visible dataset and entity metadata.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Opaque signed pagination cursor from a `rel=next` link.

get.description: Returns one record. In the `datasets` collection, the record describes a visible `dcat:Dataset`.
OGC API - Environmental Data Retrieval landing page. Mounted only when built with `ogcapi-edr`.
Conformance classes implemented by the EDR adapter.
Returns every `admin_area` spatial aggregate exposed as an EDR collection.
Returns the EDR collection metadata for one `admin_area` aggregate.
Returns aggregate values for the area defined by `coords` (WKT polygon).

parameters.name: coords
parameters.description: WKT polygon describing the query area.

post.description: POST variant of the area query for callers whose query polygons exceed practical URL lengths.

coords.description: WKT polygon describing the query area.

post.description: Generic SP DCI sync-search endpoint. Works against any registry configured under `standards.spdci.registries`. Supports `idtype-value` queries, expression `$and` with `eq`, `in`, `ge`, `le`, and predicate conditions joined with `and`.

post.summary: SP DCI disability-status check (Disability Registry only)
post.description: Returns whether the queried subject is recorded as disabled. Available only when `{registry}` resolves to the dataset/entity referenced by `standards.spdci.disability_registry`; other registries return an unknown-resource error.

post.summary: SP DCI disability details (Disability Registry only)
post.description: Returns disability-detail attributes for the queried subject. Available only when `{registry}` resolves to the dataset/entity referenced by `standards.spdci.disability_registry`.

post.summary: SP DCI disability support (Disability Registry only)
post.description: Returns disability-support attributes for the queried subject. Available only when `{registry}` resolves to the dataset/entity referenced by `standards.spdci.disability_registry`.

get.description: Returns the gateway's W3C DID document, used by verifiers to resolve the signing key for VC-JWT responses. Mounted only when `provenance.enabled: true`. Unauthenticated.

parameters.name: claim_type
parameters.description: Claim type the JSON Schema describes.

get.description: Returns the Draft 2020-12 JSON Schema for one Verifiable Credential subject claim type. Mounted only when `provenance.enabled: true`. Unauthenticated.
Returns a JSON-LD context referenced by VC-JWT responses. Mounted only when `provenance.enabled: true`. Unauthenticated.

bearerAuth.description: Carries either an API key or an OIDC JWT, depending on the gateway's `auth.mode`. API-key deployments hash the bearer with SHA-256 and compare against `config.auth.api_keys[*].hash_env`. OIDC deployments verify the JWT against the configured `auth.oidc` block and its JWKS.

apiKeyAuth.name: X-Api-Key
apiKeyAuth.description: Compatibility header accepted by API-key deployments. `Authorization: Bearer` takes precedence when both headers are present. Not accepted in OIDC mode.

EntityName.name: entity
EntityName.description: Configured entity name (`config.datasets[*].entities[*].name`). Entity names are not storage table ids.

RecordId.name: id
RecordId.description: Primary key of one entity record.

RelationshipName.name: relationship
RelationshipName.description: Configured relationship name on the source entity.

IndicatorId.name: indicator_id
IndicatorId.description: Indicator identifier discovered from aggregate declarations.

DimensionId.name: dimension_id
DimensionId.description: Dimension identifier discovered from aggregate declarations.

CollectionId.name: collection_id
CollectionId.description: OGC collection identifier. Matches a spatial entity collection (`/ogc/v1`), the `datasets` record collection (`/ogc/v1/records`), or an EDR `admin_area` aggregate (`/ogc/edr/v1`).

Limit.name: limit
Limit.description: Maximum records to return on a single page. Capped by the entity's configured `max_limit`.

Cursor.name: cursor
Cursor.description: Opaque server-owned pagination cursor. Pass the value from a previous response's `pagination.next_cursor` field unchanged.

Fields.name: fields
Fields.description: Comma-separated projection of fields to return. Only fields declared in `entities[*].fields` are addressable.

Expand.name: expand
Expand.description: Comma-separated list of relationships to expand inline, drawn from `entities[*].api.allowed_expansions`.

DataPurpose.name: Data-Purpose
DataPurpose.description: Stable, reviewable purpose IRI. Required when the entity has `require_purpose_header: true`. Recorded in audit logs; never put secrets or personal data here.

IfNoneMatch.name: If-None-Match
IfNoneMatch.description: Conditional-request validator. The gateway returns `304 Not Modified` when the validator matches the current page.

AcceptVcJwt.name: Accept
AcceptVcJwt.description: Opt in to a VC-JWT compact serialization. Available only when `provenance.enabled: true`.

value.title: Required filter missing
value.detail: entity requires at least one of the configured required_filters

value.title: Missing credential
value.detail: no credential provided in Authorization or X-Api-Key header

Forbidden.description: Caller is authenticated but lacks the required scope.

NotFound.description: Resource was not found or is not visible to the caller.

CursorGone.description: Pagination cursor refers to a snapshot that has been retired or rotated. Restart pagination from the first page.

ProblemDetails.description: RFC 9457 Problem Details. The `code` field is the stable machine-readable error name; `detail` is operator-facing and not part of the contract.

has_more.description: True when more pages remain after this one.

next_cursor.description: Server-owned cursor for the next page; null when `has_more` is false.

DatasetList.description: List of datasets visible to the caller.

DatasetSummary.description: Dataset summary as returned by `GET /datasets/{dataset_id}`. The concrete shape (entity list, links, standards adapters) depends on the dataset's runtime configuration.

EntityRecord.description: One entity record. The concrete property set comes from the entity's configured `fields`. This abstract spec only constrains the envelope; for the actual property set, fetch the entity's JSON Schema at `/datasets/{dataset_id}/{entity}/schema`.

AggregateListResponse.description: Declared aggregates for one dataset, with their group-by columns, measures, and disclosure-control policy.

AggregateQueryRequest.description: Optional dimension filters and temporal bounds for `POST /datasets/{dataset_id}/aggregates/{aggregate_id}/query`. Temporal bounds are accepted only when the aggregate declares a `temporal_field`.

AggregateResult.description: Aggregate result with disclosure-control applied to groups.

MetadataLanding.description: Metadata landing document with links to every metadata surface and an embedded scoped catalog.

MetadataDatasetList.description: Per-dataset metadata for every visible dataset.

EvidenceOfferingList.description: List of evidence-offering discovery records visible to the caller.

EvidenceOffering.description: One evidence-offering discovery record. Each offering points at a Registry Notary endpoint (`access.kind: registry-notary`) that performs the actual evidence check.

OgcRecordCollection.description: OGC API Records collection (feature collection style envelope with `dcat`-style records as items).

OgcRecord.description: OGC API Record describing one resource (for example, a visible `dcat:Dataset`).

SpdciSyncRequest.description: SP DCI sync request envelope. The specific shape is defined by SP DCI; Relay validates it against the bundled JSON Schemas (`spdci-extensions-*`).
